pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 60 ($course->shortname = 'SAFE101'), confirmed in export_result.sh lines 37-38 and verifier.py references
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 84 (create_module 'name' => 'Safety Certification Exam'), confirmed in export_result.sh line 48 (QUIZ_NAME="Safety Certification Exam")
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 73 (create_module 'name' => 'Employee Handbook'), confirmed in export_result.sh line 68 (HANDBOOK_NAME="Employee Handbook")
Code analysis: verifier.py line 31 retrieves this value from metadata; lines 46-55 verify that quiz gradepass must equal 80.00 (with 0.01 tolerance for floating point)

privileged_info_summary: The task configures course completion logic in a Moodle course named 'Workplace Safety' (shortname: SAFE101). The course contains a Quiz activity named 'Safety Certification Exam' whose 'Grade to pass' must be set to 80.00, and a Page resource named 'Employee Handbook'. The task requires configuring these activities' completion settings and establishing course-level completion criteria requiring BOTH activities. All metadata values are accurate: course_shortname is 'SAFE101', quiz_name is 'Safety Certification Exam', handbook_name is 'Employee Handbook', and target_gradepass is 80.00. The data is synthetic and created programmatically by the setup script using Moodle's data generator API.
